name: prl-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to Physical Review Letters (PRL), the American Physical Society's premier physics letters journal. Covers the importance-and-broad-interest scope gate, central-result framing, concise methods, high-impact figures, Supplemental Material partitioning, PRL house style, the strict deductible length limit, the importance-justifying cover letter, submission preflight, referee strategy, and revision. English docs with bilingual zh-CN README.
